bugs.error_message: TypeError: exclusionList is not a function at metro.config.js:28:29
bugs.root_cause: exclusionList imported from metro-config is not a function in the installed version
bugs.fix: Replaced exclusionList([/regex/]) with the regex directly as config.resolver.blockList = /regex/

bugs.root_cause: lg: text-7xl" style={{ → w-32 lg:h-32 items-center justify-center">
bugs.fix: Changed lg: text-7xl" style={{ → w-32 lg:h-32 items-center justify-center">

bugs.root_cause: Had "items-center border rounded-md w-36 lg:w-56 p-3 s
bugs.fix: Changed to "items-center border rounded-md w-36 p-3 space-y-2

bugs.root_cause: Property access on potentially null/undefined value
bugs.fix: Added null safety (optional chaining or null check)

bugs_session_2026_04_10.error_message: Emoji icons not rendering in badge cards — show '?' placeholder instead
bugs_session_2026_04_10.root_cause: NativeWind v2 babel transform on Animated.Text interferes with emoji glyph rendering when font-related classes (font-normal, text-6xl) are applied
bugs_session_2026_04_10.fix: Replaced <Typography> with plain <Text style={{...}}> for emoji rendering to bypass NativeWind transform
